results.title: Product Page
results.content: ProductX offers end-to-end analytics solutions for enterprises.

results.title: Admin Overview
results.content: Centralized management for users, roles, and security.

pages.title: Product Page
pages.content:
Introducing ProductX – the next-generation analytics platform built for speed and scale.

Core Features:
- Real-time streaming data ingestion with sub-second latency.
- Drag-and-drop dashboard builder with over 50 widget types.
- AI-powered anomaly detection and forecasting.
- Seamless integration with CRM, ERP, and 200+ connectors.
- Role-based access control and SOC 2 compliance.

Plans & Pricing:
- Starter: $99/month (5 users, 10 GB storage)
- Professional: $299/month (unlimited users, 100 GB storage, priority support)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (dedicated infrastructure, SSO, custom SLAs)

What Our Customers Say:
“We reduced our mean-time-to-insight by 40% after switching to ProductX.” – VP of Data, FinCorp.

Get Started:
Sign up for a free 14-day trial at our signup page or contact sales@example.com for a personalized demo.

Legal: Terms of Service | Privacy Policy | © 2025 Example Corp. All rights reserved.

pages.title: Admin Overview
pages.content:
Administration Dashboard

This console is restricted to system administrators and IT operations staff. Unauthorized access is prohibited.

Available Modules:
- User Management: create, disable, and manage user accounts; enforce MFA policies.
- Role Configuration: define custom roles and permission sets.
- Audit Logs: search and export detailed activity logs for compliance.
- System Health: monitor CPU, memory, and API usage across clusters.
- Billing & Invoices: review subscription status and download invoices.

Quick Actions:
- Reset a user's password
- Suspend a suspicious account
- Generate an access report
- View recent security alerts

For assistance, contact the internal IT helpdesk at it-help@example.com or extension 4500.

pages.title: Support Center
pages.content:
Welcome to the Support Center

We’re here to help you get the most out of our products. Browse our knowledge base, submit a ticket, or chat with an agent.

Knowledge Base:
- Getting Started Guides
- Troubleshooting Common Errors
- API Documentation
- KB-2001: ProductX Setup and Configuration – covers initial setup, data source integration, and user provisioning.

Support Channels:
- Community Forum: access community-driven solutions.
- Submit a Ticket: our support team responds within 4 hours for Professional plans.
- Live Chat: available Monday–Friday, 8 AM–8 PM EST.

System Status:
Check real-time service status at status.example.com.

Enterprise Customers:
Dedicated support manager and 24/7 phone line. Contact your account representative for details.
